nodes.label: Fast Path Existing Graph
nodes.rationale: When graphify-out/graph.json already exists and the user is asking a codebase question, the workflow should skip rebuild steps and run graph traversal directly for speed and scope control.

nodes.label: Vocabulary-Constrained Query Expansion
nodes.rationale: Traversal should expand user questions only with tokens already present in graph vocabulary so search remains auditable and grounded in corpus labels.

nodes.label: CAD-domain community report prompting
nodes.rationale: The prompt specializes community reporting for Russian-language CAD documentation, emphasizing UI, navigation, parameters, and workflow grounding.

nodes.label: Community report generation
nodes.rationale: The prompt defines a JSON report with title, summary, rating, findings, and date range, grounded in entities, relationships, claims, and source dates.

nodes.label: Grounded report summarization
nodes.rationale: The prompt reduces multiple reports into a grounded markdown answer with references, score, and follow-up queries.

nodes.label: Report-grounded question answering
nodes.rationale: The prompt answers user questions from provided reports, preserving citations and optionally separating unsupported general knowledge.

nodes.label: Claim extraction
nodes.rationale: The prompt extracts subject-object claims with type, status, dates, descriptions, and supporting source text.

nodes.label: CAD entity and relationship extraction
nodes.rationale: The prompt extracts Russian CAD entities and typed relationships covering windows, ribbons, parameters, documents, objects, and operations.

nodes.label: Verified external knowledge annotation
nodes.rationale: The prompt requires any real-world knowledge beyond the dataset to be explicitly tagged with [LLM: verify].

nodes.label: Ranked key-point mapping
nodes.rationale: The prompt maps data tables into JSON key points with importance scores and preserved modal verbs.

nodes.label: Default completion model
nodes.rationale: The configuration routes completion calls to a local OpenAI-compatible endpoint at 127.0.0.1:8080 using a Qwen GGUF model.

nodes.label: Default embedding model
nodes.rationale: The configuration routes embedding calls to a local OpenAI-compatible endpoint at 127.0.0.1:8010 using multilingual-e5-large.

nodes.label: GraphRAG workflow configuration
nodes.rationale: The file configures chunking, storage, extraction, summarization, community reports, and local/global/drift/basic query pipelines.

nodes.label: RAG orchestrator graph fragment
nodes.rationale: The debug output contains extracted entities and relationships for a RAG system including an orchestrator, tool layer, validation module, database, API, and document generator.

nodes.label: Embedding service runtime dependencies
nodes.rationale: The requirements file declares the FastAPI, orjson, transformers, and uvicorn packages needed to run the local embedding service.
